title: DAVID — Elizabeth I: The Tilbury Speech in Her Own English

shots.speech_text: I am DAVID. Tonight, Elizabeth the First — the queen who faced the Armada and left us her own words, attested on paper.

shots.speech_text: Born fifteen thirty-three, daughter of Anne Boleyn, crowned fifteen fifty-nine after half a sister's reign. Forty-four years on the throne — the long Elizabethan peace that was never quite peace.
